message:
fcp-conformance: capability-denial matrix across all canonical zones

Add `tests/capability_denial.rs` driving the full 11-check host
enforcement pipeline for each of `z:private`, `z:work`, `z:community`,
and `z:public`. Asserts that:

- empty `capability_claims` denies with `NO_CAPABILITY_CLAIMS`
- non-matching claims deny with `CAPABILITY_NOT_GRANTED`
- missing `required_capability` denies with `MISSING_REQUIRED_CAPABILITY`
- a matching claim allows
- a `*` wildcard claim allows
- capability denial short-circuits before later checks (records list
  contains exactly `canonical_decode`, `zone_membership`,
  `capability_verify` — no holder_proof, budget, rate_limit, etc.)

This locks in default-deny as a conformance invariant: if the host ever
regresses to allowing an empty/mismatched capability set through to
dispatch in any zone, one of these 7 tests fires.

Adds fcp-host as a dev-dep of fcp-conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
